'''Elin Roe''' was a [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]] celestial body in the [[Elin Roe system/Legends|Elin Roe system]], which was patrolled by [[Hallyn Phlynne]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. It had at least five [[Moon/Legends|moons]], the [[Elin Roe's fifth moon|fifth]] of which was bombarded with [[Radiation/Legends|radioactive]] dust after the [[Krish (species)/Legends|Krish]] [[Technician/Legends|mechanic]] [[Maniac]] had tinkered with the [[hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] of the [[Yagaran Four]]'s [[Unidentified YT-1300 light freighter|freighter]]; when the [[Starship/Legends|starship]] attempted to enter [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]], it exploded.
